languages.text: "Сожалею, но за пределами петли я виде{mf|л|ла} ваши останки. Вы погибли как герой, защищая Себериана".

traits.locale_text: драфт: вы погибли, пытаясь спасти Себериана...

languages.text: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."
languages.original_text: "Сожалею, но за пределами петли я виде{mf|л|ла} ваши останки. Вы погибли как герой, защищая Себериана".

traits.locale_text: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."
"I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."
"I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."

languages.text: “我很遗憾，但在循环之外，我确实见过你的遗骸。你为保护塞贝里安而死，你是英雄。”
languages.original_text: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."

traits.locale_text: “我很遗憾，但在循环之外，我确实见过你的遗骸。你为保护塞贝里安而死，你是英雄。”

languages.text: « Je regrette de devoir vous l'apprendre, mais j'ai vu votre dépouille en dehors de la boucle. Vous êtes mort en défendant héroïquement Seberian. »
languages.original_text: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."

traits.locale_text: « Je regrette de devoir vous l'apprendre, mais j'ai vu votre dépouille en dehors de la boucle. Vous êtes mort en défendant héroïquement Seberian. »

languages.text: "Kusura bakma ama döngünün dışındayken kalıntılarını gördüm. Seberian'ı savunan bir kahraman olarak ölmüşsün."
languages.original_text: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."

traits.locale_text: "Kusura bakma ama döngünün dışındayken kalıntılarını gördüm. Seberian'ı savunan bir kahraman olarak ölmüşsün."

languages.text: «Lo lamento, pero, fuera del bucle, he visto sus restos. Murió como un héroe, defendiendo a Seberian».
languages.original_text: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."

traits.locale_text: «Lo lamento, pero, fuera del bucle, he visto sus restos. Murió como un héroe, defendiendo a Seberian».

languages.text: "Tut mir leid, aber ich habe außerhalb der Schleife Eure sterblichen Überreste gesehen. Ihr seid bei Seberians Verteidigung den Heldentod gestorben."
languages.original_text: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."

traits.locale_text: "Tut mir leid, aber ich habe außerhalb der Schleife Eure sterblichen Überreste gesehen. Ihr seid bei Seberians Verteidigung den Heldentod gestorben."

languages.text: 「申し訳ありませんが、ループの外であなたの遺体を見ました。シベリアを護る英雄として亡くなりました。」
languages.original_text: "I'm sorry, but outside the loop, I saw your remains. You died as a hero defending Seberian."

traits.locale_text: 「申し訳ありませんが、ループの外であなたの遺体を見ました。シベリアを護る英雄として亡くなりました。」
